title: Check the progress of your tax return
description: Check the progress of your tax return using our self-help services. Most returns lodged online process within 2 weeks.
keywords: tax return status, check tax return, POR, track progress of tax return, tax return processing, check the progress

child_links.title: How to track the progress of your tax return

child_links.title: Missing tax return refunds
child_links.description: Options available if you can't find a tax refund you're expecting through electronic funds transfer (EFT).
